original_image_tags: This document appears to be a single page of aged, off-white paper with visible creases and two punch holes at the top. The text is largely illegible, faded, and reversed (mirrored), indicating it may be a carbon copy or seen through from the other side. A prominent blue ink stamp is visible in the lower-left quadrant. Handwritten notations are present in red ink at the bottom right.

elements.description: Bottom left: blue stamp with reversed text 'U.S. DEPT OF JUSTICE', 'FBI', 'RECEIVED', 'APR 21 7 59 AM '57', and handwritten name 'Mr. Jones'. Bottom center: red stamp with reversed text 'APR 26 5 20 PM '57'. Two black punch holes at the top.

judge.reason: Description A states text is illegible and reversed, while Description B quotes specific, legible, reversed text from a blue stamp, creating a direct contradiction on the visual content of the stamp text.
